title: SECNAV Resolver Candidate Schema V1
description: Structured candidate object for live lookup results before user confirmation. All candidates must be confirmed before application to payload.

candidate_version.description: Schema version identifier. Changed when breaking structural changes are introduced.

candidate_id.description: Unique identifier for this candidate. Assigned by the CLI bridge if not provided. Format: cand_<timestamp>_<random>

candidate_type.description: Classification of what kind of lookup/inference this candidate represents.

input_text.description: The raw user text or query that triggered this candidate.

resolved_value.description: Structured result of the lookup or inference. Shape varies by candidate_type. Keys should correspond to payload field paths or unit_identity fields.

recommended_kv.description: Suggested key-value lines compatible with BuilderSession.ingest_user_message(). Applied only after confirmation.

source_url.description: URL of the authoritative source for this candidate, if available. Null for purely inferred candidates.

lookup_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the lookup occurred.

confidence.description: Confidence score from 0.0 (pure guess) to 1.0 (verified from authoritative source).

requires_user_confirmation.description: Whether the user must explicitly confirm this candidate before application. Defaults to true and cannot be false for any candidate type.

explanation.description: Human-readable explanation of how this candidate was derived.
